svg.title: Plato — Brief introduction
svg.desc: Minimal typographic card with full introductory text about Plato.

div.p: Plato is one of the most influential philosophers in the European tradition and a defining shaper of how "philosophy" is practiced as systematic argument in dialogue form. His writings are almost entirely dialogues, many starring Socrates, blending drama, rhetoric critique, and arguments about justice, knowledge, love, death and the soul, and the ideal community. Interpreters disagree on how literally to take some proposals (for example in the Republic), but the texts persistently press the reader to ask what makes a life and a city good, not merely powerful or pleasant.
